cestaZivota.heroTitle: Believe the truth, be freed from sin and gain eternal life!
cestaZivota.heroText1: If you still don't believe in God the Father-Son-Spirit, please realize that your unbelief will not cause the end of His existence. The pride of your ego won't let you admit that it's not you who rules your life, but He has everything under control.
cestaZivota.heroVerse1: The fool says in his heart: There is no God!
cestaZivota.heroText2: Therefore give yourself a chance and read on.
cestaZivota.heroText3: God exists! Creation itself testifies about Him.
cestaZivota.heroVerse3: For what can be known about God is plain to them, because God has shown it to them. For his invisible attributes, namely, his eternal power and divine nature, have been clearly perceived, ever since the creation of the world, in the things that have been made. So they are without excuse.
cestaZivota.heroText4: God is love and that motivated Him to create humanity, including you, to have a personal relationship with you. However, through the fall of man in paradise we inherit a sinful nature that prevents this relationship.
cestaZivota.heroVerse4: For all have sinned and fall short of the glory of God.
cestaZivota.heroVerse5: If we say we have no sin, we deceive ourselves, and the truth is not in us.
cestaZivota.heroText6: God loves you so much that He let His Son be sacrificed for your sins, because
cestaZivota.heroVerse6: without the shedding of blood there is no forgiveness.
cestaZivota.heroVerse7: For God so loved the world, that he gave his only begotten Son, that whosoever believeth in him should not perish, but have everlasting life.
cestaZivota.s3Text1: If you choose to ignore His sacrifice and the chance of salvation, you will be condemned,
cestaZivota.s3Verse1: Whoever does not obey the Son shall not see life, but the wrath of God remains on him.
cestaZivota.s3Verse2: Whoever does not believe is condemned already, because he has not believed in the name of the only Son of God.
cestaZivota.s3Text2: Believe in the Lord Jesus Christ and you will be saved!
cestaZivota.s3Verse3: Whoever believes in the Son has eternal life.
cestaZivota.s3Verse4: Whoever believes in him is not condemned.
cestaZivota.s3Ref4addVerse: God gives grace to the humble.
cestaZivota.s3Verse5: If you confess with your mouth that Jesus is Lord and believe in your heart that God raised him from the dead, you will be saved. For with the heart one believes and is justified, and with the mouth one confesses and is saved.
cestaZivota.s3Text3: The Gospel doesn't mean "Believe, or you'll go to hell!" but "Believe, because that's where you're heading!"
cestaZivota.s3Verse6: Say to them: As surely as I live, declares the Lord GOD, I take no pleasure in the death of the wicked, but rather that the wicked should turn from their ways and live.
cestaZivota.s3Text4: Repent of your sins and confess sincerely from your heart with your mouth:
cestaZivota.s3Text4a: Heavenly Father, I thank You for sending Your Son to bear the punishment for my sins.
cestaZivota.s3Text4b: I believe that Jesus died on the cross and rose from the dead on the third day and is alive.
cestaZivota.s3Text4c: I give up my previous sinful way of life.
cestaZivota.s3Text4d: I forgive everyone who has hurt me, so I hold no grudge against anyone.
cestaZivota.s3Text4e: Please forgive me of all my sins through the blood of Jesus Christ.
cestaZivota.s3Text4g: Jesus, I confess you as my Lord and Savior.
cestaZivota.s3Text4h: Please change my heart and shape my character.
cestaZivota.s4Title: You can read more in this book
cestaZivota.s4Button: Ask me for a printed free book
cestaZivota.s5Text1: If you have believed in the Lord Jesus Christ, your sins are forgiven and you have eternal life. Now it is important to:
cestaZivota.s5Step1: Get baptized by immersion in water
cestaZivota.linkSvedkoviaDesc: A witness is one who had a personal experience and testifies about it
cestaZivota.linkDuhovyrodDesc: Whether you are homosexual or heterosexual, Jesus loves you just the same!
cestaZivota.linkKatolickaVieraDesc: Comparing Catholic traditions with God's Word

svedkovia.heroTitle: A witness is one who had a personal experience and testifies about it
svedkovia.heroSub: Don't rely on the interpretations of an organization, go to God's Word!
svedkovia.homeTitle1: Who is the key person in God's Word for us Gentiles?
svedkovia.homeText1: Jesus Christ made salvation possible for us Gentiles through His sacrifice for our sins and gave salvation to those who believe in Him.
svedkovia.homeVerse1: And there is salvation in no one else, for there is no other name under heaven given among men by which we must be saved.
svedkovia.homeText3: What command did Jesus leave shortly before His ascension?
svedkovia.homeVerse4: You will be my witnesses in Jerusalem and in all Judea and Samaria, and to the end of the earth.

duhovyrod.heroTitle: Whether you are homosexual or heterosexual, Jesus loves you just the same!
duhovyrod.heroSub: God loves every person without distinction

katolickaviera.heroSub: Comparing Catholic traditions with God's Word
